samples.speaker: Caesar
samples.text: I declare war! Rally our soldiers!

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: Sigh, grow up. You're the captain of us mercenaries, you know!

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: We've got a gig. King Caesar has declared war with the Busters!

samples.speaker: Vincent
samples.text: So an all out world war is brewing... This is huge.

samples.speaker: Hume Soldier
samples.text: There are only a few enemies. Get them!
[!cff37ff The Marching Mercenaries at the Free Trade Harbor!cffffff]

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: Hurry it up, it's taking too long!

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: Sarge, I'm counting on you to speed things up.

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: Soldiers, the success of this operation depends on how fast we move.

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: That's just a rumor... to scare people, you know?

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: You shouldn't underestimate them, you know.

samples.speaker: Rogan
samples.text: I'm not sure. In Hell, maybe? Heehee!

samples.speaker: Beril Elder
samples.text: Is he suggesting we form a state... like those wicked Hume?

samples.speaker: Kuma
samples.text: Helba, where's my mom? Where is she?

samples.speaker: Theon
samples.text: So you're saying your king is in league with the Proxies.

samples.speaker: Theon
samples.text: Yes. They want her power to take control of Drusilla.

samples.speaker: Theon
samples.text: This is the land of the ancients.  It's blocked from the rest of the world by the Ragna Volcano.

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: The enemy has started the resurrection ritual!

samples.speaker: Helba
samples.text: I understand.  Thanks old friend, you have been an invaluable asset.

samples.speaker: Helba
samples.text: We've never had a problem like this before...

samples.speaker: Vincent
samples.text: You just watch, I'll beat down every Buster in my way!

samples.speaker: Vincent
samples.text: Shut it and go rest already!

samples.speaker: Vincent
samples.text: Bah, that'll make things more difficult...

samples.speaker: Helba
samples.text: Brothers, please calm down, let's discuss this like gentle busters.

samples.speaker: Agger
samples.text: You slackers!  What took you so long?

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: This excavation can take days. The Hume won't leave us alone.

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: Are you serious? Is he really alive?

samples.speaker: Manos
samples.text: I've been preparing for this day... for a long time.

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: This can't be happening.  I must... avenge Lantere...

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: So do we. Take them if you can!

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: You fool, this is war... not some game.

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: Go! Don't let them get away!

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: I'm putting you in charge for their capture. Dismissed.

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: Bah, I knew I shouldn't have trusted that old fool...

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: Theon, I'll catch you... After Atheum, however.

samples.speaker: Neive
samples.text: Me?  What are YOU doing here? I thought you were in K'sil.

samples.speaker: Neive
samples.text: And some enemies as well. ha ha ha.

samples.speaker: Neive
samples.text: The wind is too strong... our !c00ff00Battleship!cffffff can't move forward.

samples.speaker: Neive
samples.text: Hmm... It's difficult dealing with all three races at the same time.

samples.speaker: Helba
samples.text: Whatever you are, you're going to die today!

samples.speaker: Helba
samples.text: Return our brothers to us... or we'll take them by force!

samples.speaker: Agger
samples.text: Why should I care? You mercenaries do anything for money.

samples.speaker: Mercenary 1
samples.text: Captain, are you sure about this?

samples.speaker: Vincent
samples.text: What? How did you even manage to...

samples.speaker: Vincent
samples.text: Supplies? I thought the general took care of those.

samples.speaker: Mercenaries
samples.text: We're just kidding. Mwa ha ha!

samples.speaker: Agger
samples.text: I want you to take full charge of the Beril siege.

samples.speaker: Agger
samples.text: Do it, or... return my money!

samples.speaker: Mercenary 1
samples.text: He said... He has no supplies for us.

samples.speaker: Vincent
samples.text: Cecil, give him the money. We're out!

samples.speaker: Vincent
samples.text: Yes, and do you know why?  We've been doing all the fighting!!

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: We don't want to kill you. Tell us what you were saying earlier.

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: I remember Gramps saying something similar.

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: Vincent, we should listen to him.

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: Why did the Elven attack the Hume?

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: That can't be coincidence... can it?

samples.text: Welcome to !cff37ffIron Castle!cffffff. I'm Guardian Knight !c00ffffMartin!cffffff.

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: The Busters have started fighting back.

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: My my... what a place this is.

samples.speaker: Vincent
samples.text: Phew, those Witches almost got us.

samples.speaker: Lantere
samples.text: Juno, I couldn't help but notice... you've grown into quite the warrior.

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: This is just getting worse and worse... just how bad does it get?

samples.speaker: 란테르
samples.text: 크윽.. 말도 안돼.. 엘븐이 흄에게 질리가..

samples.speaker: 세실
samples.text: 우리.. 점점 엄청난 음모 속에 빠져들어가는 같아.

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: Vincent, how you acted back there... I was impressed!

samples.speaker: Vincent
samples.text: Hey, we'll attack here. You take out that place.

samples.speaker: 빈센트
samples.text: 이봐! 여기는 우리가 공격 할테니, 너희는 저길 공격해.

samples.speaker: Juno
samples.text: Do you think the !c00ff00Sanctum!cffffff is okay?

samples.speaker: Manos
samples.text: Theon, I wish you didn't come.

samples.speaker: Cecil
samples.text: Finally the palace is right ahead of us.

samples.speaker: Arang
samples.text: We can't do this... it's just too much!

samples.speaker: Arang
samples.text: Warrior, let me give you some combat advice.

samples.speaker: Elven Soldier
samples.text: Consul, we've spotted the Hume mercenaries!

samples.speaker: 아랑
samples.text: 위대한 전사여, 전투에 대해 약간의 조언을 드리겠습니다.

samples.speaker: 엘븐병사
samples.text: 집정관님! 근처에 전에 만난 용병단이 있습니다!

samples.speaker: Vincent
samples.text: Old man Neive, what are you doing here?

samples.speaker: Lantere
samples.text: Juno, as your adjutant, let me give you some combat advice.

samples.speaker: 란테르
samples.text: 유노, 참모로서 내가 전투하는 법에 대해 조언을 해 줄게.

samples.speaker: Rogan
samples.text: Oh it's you guys... the traitors.
